videoSnippet.title: Magnus Carlsen vs Arjun Erigaisi || TePe Sigeman 2026 Playoff
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Erigaisi Arjun (2776) - Carlsen, Magnus (2869)
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.05.07
D35 Queen's Gambit Declined, exchange, positional line

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 Bb4 4.g3 O-O 5.Bg2 d5 6.a3 Be7 7.Qd3 b6 8.cxd5 Nxd5 9.Nf3 Bb7 10.Nxd5 exd5 11.O-O Nd7 12.Bf4 c5 13.b3 Re8 14.h4 h6 15.Rfd1 a5 16.a4 Ba6 17.Qc2 Rc8 18.Qb2 Nf6 19.Bh3 Ra8 20.Be5 Bf8 21.Rac1 Ne4 22.dxc5 bxc5 23.Bf5 Nf6 24.Bxf6 Qxf6 25.Qxf6 gxf6 26.Rxd5 Bxe2 27.Nd2 Red8 28.Be4 Rxd5 29.Bxd5 Rd8 30.Ne4 f5 31.Nc3 Ba6 32.Bc4 Bb7 33.Rd1 Rd4 34.Kf1 f4 35.Rxd4 cxd4 36.Nb5 fxg3 37.fxg3 Bc5 38.Ke2 Be4 39.Bd3 f5 40.Nc7 Kf7 41.Na6 Bd6 42.g4 Bxd3+ 43.Kxd3 fxg4 44.Kxd4 Kg6 45.Ke3 Kh5 46.Kd4

02:25 CNG (b6)
08:50 GAME 2
16:00 GAME 3
